essence: Installs, maintains, and repairs robotic systems used in manufacturing, logistics, and service environments.

identity.title: Robotics Technician
identity.summary: Maintains robotic arms, mobile robots, and automation cells; performs diagnostics, repairs, and routine servicing to keep systems operational.

salary.notes: Specialist technicians with programming and safety certification can command higher pay.

qualifications: Vocational qualification or apprenticeship in robotics, mechatronics, or electrical engineering
Experience with PLCs, robot controllers, and industrial networks
Ability to read schematics and perform mechanical repairs
Familiarity with safety standards and lockout/tagout procedures

lifestyle.description: Field and workshop work with a mix of hands‑on mechanical tasks and controller programming. Often shift‑based in factories or on customer sites.

habits: Diagnoses faults using logs and diagnostic tools
Works with engineers to implement upgrades
